description_long: This record player features a sleek, rectangular base with a matte black finish and rounded corners, supported by four short feet. The large, circular turntable platter dominates the center, with a metallic spindle at its core. To the right, a metallic tonearm with a visible counterweight and pivot mechanism extends over the platter, ending in a small stylus assembly. The surface is mostly smooth, with minimal visible controls except for a single round button or knob on the front right corner. The overall design is modern and minimalist, with no dust cover present and all mechanical components exposed. The materials appear to be primarily metal and plastic, giving it a sturdy yet refined appearance.
description: A modern, minimalist record player with a matte black base, exposed metallic tonearm, and a large central platter. The design is sleek, with few visible controls and no dust cover.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large black platter, central spindle, and the tonearm assembly on the right side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the tonearm resting over the platter and the compact, rectangular base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tonearm's pivot mechanism and counterweight, with the platter and feet visible.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the circular platter, spindle, and the tonearm's position over the right edge.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, large, and circular, occupying the central area of the record player. It appears to be made of black plastic or metal with a matte finish and a smooth surface, featuring a raised metallic spindle at the center. No grooves or decorative patterns are visible, and the platter is proportionally the largest component on the device.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, metallic, and elongated, extending from the right side of the base toward the center of the platter. It has a cylindrical shape with a visible counterweight at the rear and a pivot mechanism. The tonearm is resting over the platter and has a sleek, silver finish.
attribute_stylus: The stylus is visible as a small, pointed component attached to the end of the tonearm. It appears to be metallic or plastic, small in size, and is clearly a separate component from the tonearm.
attribute_control_knobs: A single round button or knob is visible on the front right corner of the base. It is small, metallic or plastic, and lacks visible labels or markings. No other control knobs or switches are present.
